The L-shape is N (green). The N block in the upper right is also green. So we have two green things: the L-shape and the placed N block.
Wait, maybe the goal is to have the colors match the reference row in some way. The reference row is: O, p, R, b, N, Y, M.
If the upper frame represents the first part and the lower frame represents the second part:

- Lower: b, Y, M, [?]
